---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-27"
---
```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 1 — PACKAGES
# =========================================================

packages <- c(
  "terra",
  "sf",
  "dplyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "geodata",
  "lwgeom",
  "tidyr",
  "readxl",
  "stringr",
  "fixest",
  "here", 
  "geosphere", 
  "modelsummary",
  "ggrepel", 
  "tinytable"
)

new_packages <- packages[!(packages %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]

if(length(new_packages))
  install.packages(new_packages)

invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))


```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 2 — LOAD NIGHTTIME LIGHT FILES
# =========================================================

ntl_files <- list.files(
  "Data/NIGHT LIGHT DATA/",
  pattern = "AZE_NTL.*\\.tif$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

ntl_stack <- rast(ntl_files)

# Check files
print(ntl_files)
print(ntl_stack)
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 3 — CLEAN NIGHTTIME LIGHT DATA
# =========================================================

# Negative values are invalid
ntl_stack[ntl_stack < 0] <- NA

# Maximum light across all years
ntl_max <- max(ntl_stack, na.rm = TRUE)

# Log-transform for better visualization
ntl_max_log <- log1p(ntl_max)




```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 4 — LOAD AZERBAIJAN DISTRICT BOUNDARIES
# =========================================================

aze <- st_read(here("Data", "GADM41_AZE_SHP", "gadm41_AZE_2.shp"))
aze_sf <- st_as_sf(aze)
aze_sf <- st_make_valid(aze_sf)

# Transform to metric CRS for maps and area calculations
aze_plot <- st_transform(aze_sf, 32639)

district_names <- aze_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(NAME_1, NAME_2)

# Bütün unikal adlar
unique(district_names$NAME_2)

# Say
length(unique(district_names$NAME_2))


```








```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 5 — MAP 1: REAL NIGHTTIME LIGHT INTENSITY MAP
# =========================================================

# This map shows actual light intensity, not clusters

# =========================================================
# Maximum NTL map (publication style)
# =========================================================

ntl_max_log_utm <- project(ntl_max_log, "EPSG:32639")

pdf(
  file = here::here(
    "figures",
    "max_ntl_intensity_2010_2023.pdf"
  ),
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

plot(
  ntl_max_log_utm,
  col = hcl.colors(150, "Inferno"),
  axes = FALSE,
  box = FALSE,
  legend.args = list(
    text = "log(NTL + 1)",
    side = 4,
    line = 2
  ),
  main = "Nighttime Lights as a Proxy for Economic Activity (2010–2023)"
)

plot(
  st_geometry(aze_plot),
  add = TRUE,
  border = "grey20",
  lwd = 0.4
)

dev.off()
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 5B — RECREATE ZERO-FILLED NTL STACK
# =========================================================

# Replace missing values with 0
ntl_stack_zero <- subst(
  ntl_stack,
  NA,
  0
)

# Check
ntl_stack_zero
```


```{r}
# CHUNK 6 — PERSISTENTLY LIT PIXELS

thr <- 1
min_years <- 3

lit_count <- app(
  ntl_stack_zero > thr,
  sum
)

ever_lit <- lit_count >= min_years

pdf(
  file = here::here(
    "figures",
    "persistent_lit_pixels.pdf"
  ),
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

plot(
  ever_lit,
  main = paste0(
    "Pixels with NTL > ", thr,
    " in at least ", min_years, " years"
  ),
  axes = FALSE,
  box = FALSE,
  col = c("grey95", "darkorange")
)

plot(
  st_geometry(aze_plot),
  add = TRUE,
  border = "grey20",
  lwd = 0.4
)

dev.off()
```





















```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 13 — SUMMARY TABLE
# =========================================================

#summary(cities_final$area_km2)

#cities_final %>%st_drop_geometry() %>% arrange(desc(area_km2)) %>% select(NAME_1, NAME_2, area_km2, compactness) %>% head(20)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 14 — SAVE OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#saveRDS( cities_final, "Data/cities_final_admin_constrained.rds")

#st_write( cities_final, "Data/cities_final_admin_constrained.gpkg",delete_dsn = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 15 — PREPARE FIXED PIXEL GRID
# =========================================================


years <- 2010:2020

stopifnot(nlyr(ntl_stack) == length(years))

names(ntl_stack) <- paste0("ntl_", years)

names(ntl_stack)
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 16 — DEFINE EVER-LIT PIXELS, BUT CLEANER VERSION
# =========================================================

# convert  NA to 0 
ntl_stack_zero <- subst(ntl_stack, NA, 0)

# Count how many years each pixel has NTL > 1
lit_count <- app(
  ntl_stack_zero > 1,
  sum
)

# Keep pixels that have been illuminated for at least 3 years
ever_lit_panel <- lit_count >= 3

plot(ever_lit_panel)

cat(
  "Kept stable-lit pixels:",
  global(ever_lit_panel, "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[1, 1],
  "\n"
)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 17 — CREATE PIXEL GRID ONLY FOR EVER-LIT PIXELS
# =========================================================

template <- ntl_stack_zero[[1]]

# All cell IDs
all_cells <- 1:ncell(template)

# Extract ever-lit value for all cells
ever_lit_values <- values(ever_lit_panel)

# Keep only cells where ever_lit_panel == TRUE
keep_cells <- all_cells[ever_lit_values == 1]

cat("Total raster pixels:", length(all_cells), "\n")
cat("Ever-lit pixels kept:", length(keep_cells), "\n")

# Coordinates of kept pixels
xy <- xyFromCell(template, keep_cells)

pixels_df <- data.frame(
  pixel_id = keep_cells,
  x = xy[, 1],
  y = xy[, 2]
)

head(pixels_df)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 18 — CONVERT PIXELS TO SF POINTS
# =========================================================

pixels_sf <- st_as_sf(
  pixels_df,
  coords = c("x", "y"),
  crs = crs(template),
  remove = FALSE
)

head(pixels_sf)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 19 — ASSIGN ADMINISTRATIVE DISTRICT TO EACH PIXEL
# =========================================================

# Use Azerbaijan district boundaries from previous step
aze_for_join <- st_transform(aze_sf, st_crs(pixels_sf))

pixels_sf <- st_join(
  pixels_sf,
  aze_for_join %>% select(NAME_1, NAME_2),
  left = FALSE
)

cat("Ever-lit pixels inside Azerbaijan districts:", nrow(pixels_sf), "\n")

head(pixels_sf)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 20 — EXTRACT NTL VALUES FOR EACH PIXEL AND YEAR
# =========================================================

ntl_values <- terra::extract(
  ntl_stack_zero,
  vect(pixels_sf)
)

# Remove terra ID column
ntl_values <- ntl_values %>%
  select(-ID)

head(ntl_values)

# Check missing values
colSums(is.na(ntl_values))
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 21 — CREATE WIDE PANEL DATA
# =========================================================

panel_wide <- bind_cols(
  pixels_sf %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    select(pixel_id, x, y, NAME_1, NAME_2),
  ntl_values
)

head(panel_wide)
dim(panel_wide)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 22 — CONVERT TO LONG PIXEL-YEAR PANEL
# =========================================================

panel_long <- panel_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("ntl_"),
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "ntl"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(gsub("ntl_", "", year)),
    ntl = ifelse(is.na(ntl), 0, ntl),
    log_ntl = log1p(ntl)
  ) %>%
  arrange(pixel_id, year)

head(panel_long)
dim(panel_long)

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 23 — PANEL CHECKS
# =========================================================

# Observation count
cat("Panel observations:", nrow(panel_long), "\n")

# Number of unique pixels
cat("Unique pixels:", length(unique(panel_long$pixel_id)), "\n")

# Years
table(panel_long$year)

# Districts
panel_long %>%
  filter(year == 2023) %>%
  count(NAME_1, NAME_2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(20)

# NTL summary
summary(panel_long$ntl)
summary(panel_long$log_ntl)
  
 # =========================================================
# CHUNK 23b — CLEAN DISTRICT NAMES (FINAL)
# =========================================================

panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  mutate(
    NAME_2 = case_when(

      # city → district
      NAME_2 == "Lənkəran City" ~ "Lənkəran",
      NAME_2 == "Yevlax City" ~ "Yevlax",
      NAME_2 == "Şəki City" ~ "Şəki",

      # Old city names
      NAME_2 == "Xanlar" ~ "Göygöl",
      NAME_2 == "Əli Bayramlı" ~ "Şirvan",
      NAME_2 == "Dəvəçi" ~ "Şabran",

      # transliterasiya
      NAME_2 == "Xizı" ~ "Xızı",
      NAME_2 == "Khankendi (Nagorno-Karabakh)" ~ "Xankəndi",
      NAME_2 == "Lachin" ~ "Laçın",
      NAME_2 == "Qubadli" ~ "Qubadlı",

      # Şuşa city + rayon
      NAME_2 %in% c(
        "Şuşa (CIty) (Nagorno-Karabakh)",
        "Şuşa (Rayon) (Nagorno-Karabakh)"
      ) ~ "Şuşa",

      # Ağdərə
      NAME_2 %in% c(
        "Kəlbəcər (Nagorno-Karabakh)",
        "Tərtər (Nagorno-Karabakh)"
      ) ~ "Ağdərə",

      TRUE ~ NAME_2
    ),

    # Remove all remaining "Nagorno-Karabakh" text
    NAME_2 = gsub(
      " \\(Nagorno-Karabakh\\)",
      "",
      NAME_2
    )
  )



sort(unique(panel_long$NAME_2))
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 23B — ADD ALTERNATIVE LOG VARIABLES
# =========================================================

panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  mutate(
    # Main specification
    log_ntl = log1p(ntl),
    
    # Robustness: small constant as in zero-light literature
    ntl_eps = ifelse(ntl == 0, 0.01, ntl),
    log_ntl_eps = log(ntl_eps)
  )

summary(panel_long$log_ntl)
summary(panel_long$log_ntl_eps)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 24 — SAVE PANEL DATA
# =========================================================

saveRDS(
  panel_long,
  here::here(
    "data",
    "clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ever_lit_2010_2023.rds"
  )
)

cat(
  "Saved:",
  here::here(
    "data",
    "clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ever_lit_2010_2023.rds"
  ),
  "\n"
)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 25 — LOAD ROAD DATA
# =========================================================



roads <- st_read(
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "Road Data",
    "hotosm_aze_roads_lines_shp.shp"
  )
)
roads <- st_make_valid(roads)

names(roads)
head(roads)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 26 — CHECK ROAD TYPES
# =========================================================

roads %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(highway, sort = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 27 — GROUP ROAD TYPES
# =========================================================

roads <- roads %>%
  mutate(
    road_group = case_when(

      # Main national highways
      highway %in% c(
        "motorway",
        "trunk",
        "primary"
      ) ~ "major",

      # Important regional roads
      highway %in% c(
        "secondary",
        "tertiary"
      ) ~ "secondary",

      # Local roads
      highway %in% c(
        "residential",
        "living_street",
        "service",
        "unclassified"
      ) ~ "local",

      # Non-road paths
      highway %in% c(
        "track",
        "path",
        "footway"
      ) ~ "minor_nonroad",

      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  )

roads %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(road_group, sort = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 28 — LOAD PANEL AND CREATE PIXEL POINTS
# =========================================================

panel_long <- readRDS(
  here::here(
    "Data", "Clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ever_lit_2010_2023.rds"
  )
)
pixels_unique <- panel_long %>%
  distinct(pixel_id, x, y, NAME_1, NAME_2)

pixels_sf <- st_as_sf(
  pixels_unique,
  coords = c("x", "y"),
  crs = 4326,
  remove = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 29 — TRANSFORM TO METRIC CRS
# =========================================================

pixels_m <- st_transform(pixels_sf, 32639)
roads_m <- st_transform(roads, 32639)
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 30 — DISTANCE TO NEAREST MAJOR AND SECONDARY ROAD
# =========================================================

major_roads <- roads_m %>%
  filter(road_group == "major")

secondary_roads <- roads_m %>%
  filter(road_group == "secondary")

# distance in meters
pixels_m$dist_major_road_m <- as.numeric(
  st_distance(pixels_m, st_union(major_roads))
)

pixels_m$dist_secondary_road_m <- as.numeric(
  st_distance(pixels_m, st_union(secondary_roads))
)

road_distance_vars <- pixels_m %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(
    pixel_id,
    dist_major_road_m,
    dist_secondary_road_m
  )

summary(road_distance_vars)
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 31 — MERGE ROAD DISTANCES TO PANEL
# =========================================================

panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  left_join(road_distance_vars, by = "pixel_id")

summary(panel_long$dist_major_road_m)
summary(panel_long$dist_secondary_road_m)
```




```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 31B — LOG ROAD DISTANCES
# =========================================================

panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  mutate(
    log_dist_major = log1p(dist_major_road_m),
    log_dist_secondary = log1p(dist_secondary_road_m)
  )

summary(panel_long$log_dist_major)
summary(panel_long$log_dist_secondary)
```






```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 32 — SAVE PANEL WITH ROAD DISTANCES
# =========================================================

saveRDS(
  panel_long,
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "Clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ntl_roads_2010_2023.rds"
  )
)



cat(
  "Saved:",
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "Clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ntl_roads_2010_2023.rds"
  ),
  "\n"
)
```
```{r}

pdf(
  file = here::here(
    "Figures",
    "nighttime_lights_major_roads_2010_2020.pdf"
  ),
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

# =========================================================
# NIGHTTIME LIGHTS AND ROAD NETWORK
# =========================================================

aze_outline <- aze_plot %>%
  summarise()

par(
  bg = "white",
  mar = c(1, 1, 3, 4)
)

plot(
  ntl_max_log_utm,
  col = hcl.colors(200, "Inferno"),
  axes = FALSE,
  box = FALSE,
  plg = list(
    title = "Log  Lights",
    cex = 0.9
  ),
  main = "Nighttime Lights and Road Network (2010–2020)"
)

plot(
  st_geometry(secondary_roads),
  add = TRUE,
  col = adjustcolor("grey70", alpha.f = 0.5),
  lwd = 0.3
)

plot(
  st_geometry(major_roads),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "#2C7FB8",
  lwd = 1
)

plot(
  st_geometry(aze_outline),
  add = TRUE,
  border = "black",
  lwd = 0.5
)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = c(
    "Major roads",
    "Secondary roads"
  ),
  col = c(
    "#2C7FB8",
    "grey70"
  ),
  lwd = c(
    1.4,
    0.3
  ),
  bty = "n",
  cex = 0.8
)

dev.off()
```






```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 33 — LOAD OIL DATA
# =========================================================

excel_sheets(
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "CMO-Historical-Data-Annual.xlsx"
  )
)

oil_raw <- readxl::read_excel(
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "CMO-Historical-Data-Annual.xlsx"
  ),
  sheet = "Annual Prices (Nominal)",
  skip = 6
)

dim(oil_raw)
names(oil_raw)
head(oil_raw)

```




```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 34 — CLEAN BRENT OIL PRICE DATA
# =========================================================

oil <- oil_raw %>%
  select(
    year = ...1,
    oil_price_brent = `Crude oil, Brent`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(year),
    oil_price_brent = as.numeric(oil_price_brent)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    year >= 2010,
    year <= 2023
  )

oil
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 35 — MERGE OIL PRICE TO PANEL
# =========================================================

panel_long <- readRDS(
  here::here(
    "Data", "Clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ntl_roads_2010_2023.rds"
  )
)
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  left_join(oil, by = "year")

summary(panel_long$oil_price_brent)

table(is.na(panel_long$oil_price_brent))

saveRDS(
  panel_long,
  here::here(
    "Data",
    "Clean",
    "pixel_year_panel_ntl_roads_oil_2010_2023.rds"
  )
)
```




```{r}
# CHUNK 36 — MERGE Investment  TO PANEL


inv_raw <- read_excel(
  here("Data", "əsas kapitala yönəldilmiş investisiyalar.xls"),
  sheet = "2002-2023",
  skip = 4
)

# Change the firsty column
names(inv_raw)[1] <- "name_raw"

# chechkj
head(inv_raw)
print(names(inv_raw))

# --- 2. clean ---
inv_clean <- inv_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(name_raw)) %>%
  # "o cümlədən" remove
  filter(!str_detect(name_raw, "o cümlədən")) %>%
  # economic regions remove (aqreqat regionlar)
  filter(!str_detect(name_raw, "iqtisadi rayonu")) %>%
  # Naxçıvan Muxtar Respublikasını remoive (aqreqat)
  filter(!str_detect(name_raw, "Muxtar")) %>%
  mutate(
    name_clean = str_trim(name_raw),
# Convert all spaces and newlines to a single space
name_clean = str_replace_all(name_clean, "\\s+", " "),
    # "şəhəri" remove
    name_clean = str_replace(name_clean, "\\s*şəhəri\\s*$", ""),
    # "rayonu" remove
    name_clean = str_replace(name_clean, "\\s*rayonu\\s*$", ""),
    # clean the spaceə
    name_clean = str_trim(name_clean)
  )

# check — clean names
print(inv_clean$name_clean)
cat("\nTotal number of districts/cities:", nrow(inv_clean), "\n")






```
```{r}
# --- 2. WIDE → LONG ---
inv_long <- inv_clean %>%
  select(-name_raw) %>%
  mutate(across(-name_clean, as.character)) %>%  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -name_clean,
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "investment"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(year),
    investment = as.numeric(investment)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  rename(NAME_2 = name_clean)

head(inv_long)

# --- 3. Only 2010-2023 ---
inv_2010 <- inv_long %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2020)


```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# INVESTMENT-i PANEL_LONG-A MERGE
# =========================================================


# --- 1. PANEL_LONG  ---
panel_long <- readRDS(here("Data", "Clean", "pixel_year_panel_ntl_roads_oil_2010_2023.rds"))

# Remove old duplicate columns (if any)
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  select(-any_of(c("oil_price_brent.x", "oil_price_brent.y",
                    "dist_major_road_m.x", "dist_major_road_m.y",
                    "dist_secondary_road_m.x", "dist_secondary_road_m.y")))

# --- 2. CHECK FOR INCONSISTENT NAMES ---
panel_names <- unique(panel_long$NAME_2)
inv_names   <- unique(inv_2010$NAME_2)

cat("===========================================\n")
cat("\nIn panel, but not in Excel:\n")
print(setdiff(panel_names, inv_names))

cat("\nIn Excel, but not in panel:\n")
print(setdiff(inv_names, panel_names))
cat("===========================================\n")

# --- 3. MERGE ---
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  left_join(inv_2010, by = c("NAME_2", "year"))

# --- 4. LOG INVESTMENT ---
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  mutate(log_investment = log(investment + 1))

# --- 5. Check ---
cat("\nNA investment count:", sum(is.na(panel_long$investment)), "\n")
cat("Total observations:", nrow(panel_long), "\n")
cat("Districts with investment data:", 
    length(unique(panel_long$NAME_2[!is.na(panel_long$investment)])), "\n")

summary(panel_long$investment)
summary(panel_long$log_investment)

# --- 6. SAVE ---
saveRDS(panel_long, here("Data", "Clean",  "panel_with_investment.rds"))
cat("\n✅ T\n")


```


```{r}
# Nakhchivan districts
nakhchivan_districts <- c("Naxçıvan", "Babək", "Culfa", 
                          "Ordubad", "Sədərək", 
                          "Şahbuz", "Şərur")

# Before removing
cat("Observations before removal:", nrow(panel_long), "\n")
cat("NA investment:", sum(is.na(panel_long$investment)), "\n")

# REMOVE
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  filter(!(NAME_2 %in% nakhchivan_districts))

# After removing
cat("\nObservations after removal:", nrow(panel_long), "obs\n")
cat("NA investment:", sum(is.na(panel_long$investment)), "\n")
cat("Number of districts:", length(unique(panel_long$NAME_2)), "\n")

# Save


cat("\nNakhchivan districts removed successfully.\n")

panel_long %>%
  filter(is.na(investment)) %>%
  count(NAME_2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print(n = 50)
```
```{r}

# Occupied territories during 1992-2020
karabakh_districts <- c("Ağdərə", "Şuşa", "Xankəndi", "Xocalı", 
                         "Xocavənd", "Kəlbəcər", "Laçın", 
                         "Qubadlı", "Zəngilan", "Cəbrayıl",
                         "Ağdam", "Füzuli")

# Before removal
cat("Before removal:", nrow(panel_long), "obs\n")
cat("NA investment:", sum(is.na(panel_long$investment)), "\n")

# Remove Karabakh districts AND years 2021-2023
panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  filter(!(NAME_2 %in% karabakh_districts)) %>%
  filter(year <= 2020)

# After removal
cat("\nAfter removal:", nrow(panel_long), "obs\n")
cat("NA investment:", sum(is.na(panel_long$investment)), "\n")
cat("Districts:", length(unique(panel_long$NAME_2)), "\n")
cat("Years:", paste(sort(unique(panel_long$year)), collapse=", "), "\n")

# Save

cat("\nKarabakh districts and years 2021-2023 removed successfully.\n")


saveRDS(panel_long, here("Data", "Clean", "panel_final.rds"))

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 40E — FIX DISTRICT CENTROIDS AFTER NAME CLEANING
# =========================================================



aze_clean <- aze %>%
  mutate(
    NAME_2 = case_when(
      NAME_2 == "Lənkəran City" ~ "Lənkəran",
      NAME_2 == "Yevlax City" ~ "Yevlax",
      NAME_2 == "Şəki City" ~ "Şəki",

      NAME_2 == "Xanlar" ~ "Göygöl",
      NAME_2 == "Əli Bayramlı" ~ "Şirvan",
      NAME_2 == "Dəvəçi" ~ "Şabran",

      NAME_2 == "Xizı" ~ "Xızı",
      NAME_2 == "Lachin" ~ "Laçın",
      NAME_2 == "Qubadli" ~ "Qubadlı",
      NAME_2 == "Khankendi (Nagorno-Karabakh)" ~ "Xankəndi",

      NAME_2 %in% c(
        "Şuşa (CIty) (Nagorno-Karabakh)",
        "Şuşa (Rayon) (Nagorno-Karabakh)"
      ) ~ "Şuşa",

      NAME_2 %in% c(
        "Kəlbəcər (Nagorno-Karabakh)",
        "Tərtər (Nagorno-Karabakh)"
      ) ~ "Ağdərə",

      TRUE ~ NAME_2
    ),
    NAME_2 = gsub(" \\(Nagorno-Karabakh\\)", "", NAME_2)
  ) %>%
  group_by(NAME_2) %>%
  summarise(
    geometry = st_union(geometry),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  st_make_valid()

district_centroids_clean <- st_point_on_surface(aze_clean)

coords_clean <- st_coordinates(district_centroids_clean)

district_centroids_df <- district_centroids_clean %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(
    district_x = coords_clean[, 1],
    district_y = coords_clean[, 2]
  ) %>%
  select(NAME_2, district_x, district_y)

#district_panel <- district_panel %>%
  #select(-any_of(c("x", "y"))) %>%
 # left_join(
  #  district_centroids_df,
 #   by = "NAME_2"
 # )

#district_panel %>%
  #filter(is.na(x) | is.na(y)) %>%
  #distinct(NAME_2)


panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  select(
    -any_of(c(
      "NAME_2.x",
      "NAME_2.y",
      "NAME_2.x.x",
      "NAME_2.y.y",
      "x_centroid",
      "y_centroid",
      "district_x",
      "district_y"
    ))
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    district_centroids_df,
    by = "NAME_2"
  )

# Check
panel_long %>%
  select(pixel_id, NAME_2, x, y, district_x, district_y) %>%
  head()

panel_long %>%
  filter(is.na(district_x) | is.na(district_y)) %>%
  distinct(NAME_2)


district_panel <- panel_long %>%
  group_by(NAME_2, year) %>%
  summarise(
    investment = first(investment),
    oil_price = first(oil_price_brent),
    district_x = first(district_x),
    district_y = first(district_y),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(district_panel)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK — CHECK DISTRICT CENTROIDS (UPDATED)
# =========================================================

# Check if any district has missing centroid coordinates
panel_long %>%
  filter(
    is.na(district_x) |
    is.na(district_y)
  ) %>%
  distinct(NAME_2)

# Check if each district has only one centroid pair
panel_long %>%
  distinct(
    NAME_2,
    district_x,
    district_y
  ) %>%
  count(NAME_2) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# Create district point layer
district_points <- panel_long %>%

  distinct(
    NAME_2,
    district_x,
    district_y
  ) %>%

  st_as_sf(
    coords = c(
      "district_x",
      "district_y"
    ),
    crs = 4326,
    remove = FALSE
  )

# Visual check
ggplot() +

geom_sf(
data = aze_clean,
fill = "white",
color = "grey70",
linewidth = 0.2
)+

geom_sf(
data = district_points,
color = "red",
size = 1.5
)+

theme_void()+

labs(
title =
"District Centroid Check"
)
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 41 — DISTANCE TO BAKU (DISTRICT CENTROIDS)
# =========================================================


# Baku coordinates
# longitude, latitude
baku <- c(
  49.8671,
  40.4093
)

district_panel <- district_panel %>%
  mutate(

    dist_baku_km =

      geosphere::distHaversine(

        cbind(
          district_x,
          district_y
        ),

        baku

      ) / 1000,

    log_dist_baku =

      log1p(
        dist_baku_km
      )

  )

summary(
  district_panel$dist_baku_km
)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 42 — CREATE OIL × DISTANCE INSTRUMENT for cities
# =========================================================

district_panel <- district_panel %>%
  mutate(

    # Instrument
    oil_x_dist_baku =

      oil_price *
      dist_baku_km,

    oil_x_log_dist_baku =

      oil_price *
      log_dist_baku,

    # Outcome transform
    log_investment =

      log1p(
        investment
      )

  )

# Check
district_panel %>%

select(

NAME_2,
year,

oil_price,

dist_baku_km,

oil_x_dist_baku,

oil_x_log_dist_baku,

investment,

log_investment

) %>%

head()



```






```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK — PIXEL DISTANCE TO BAKU
# =========================================================


baku <- c(
  49.8671,
  40.4093
)

panel_long <- panel_long %>%
  mutate(

    dist_baku_km =

      geosphere::distHaversine(

        cbind(
          x,
          y
        ),

        baku

      ) / 1000,

    log_dist_baku =

      log1p(
        dist_baku_km
      )

  )

summary(
panel_long$dist_baku_km
)
```
```{r}
#Decs Statistics
desc_data <- panel_long %>%
  select(
    `NTL` = ntl,
    `Log NTL` = log_ntl_eps,
    `Brent oil price` = oil_price_brent,
    `Distance to Baku (km)` = dist_baku_km,
    `Distance to major road (m)` = dist_major_road_m,
    `Distance to secondary road (m)` = dist_secondary_road_m
  )

# Save clean LaTeX table
dir.create(
  here("Figures"),
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

datasummary(

All(desc_data) ~
(
N +
Mean +
SD +
Min +
Median +
Max
),

data = desc_data,

fmt = 1,

output =
here(
"Figures",
"descriptive_statistics.tex"
)

)






desc_district <- district_panel %>%
  select(

    `Total fixed capital investment` =
      investment,

    `Log investment` =
      log_investment,

    `Brent oil price` =
      oil_price,

    `Distance to Baku (km)` =
      dist_baku_km,

    `Oil × log distance to Baku` =
      oil_x_log_dist_baku

  )

# Create folder
dir.create(
  here("Figures"),
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

# Export LaTeX table
datasummary(

All(desc_district)
~
(
N +
Mean +
SD +
Min +
Median +
Max
),

data =
desc_district,

fmt = 1,

output =
here(
"Figures",
"district_descriptive_statistics.tex"
)

)
```


```{r} 
rf_main <- feols(

log_ntl_eps ~

oil_price_brent:
log_dist_baku

|

pixel_id
+
year,

data =
panel_long

)

summary(
rf_main,
cluster=
~NAME_2
)
```

```{r}
rf_roads <- feols(

log_ntl_eps ~

oil_price_brent:
log_dist_baku

+
log_dist_major
+
log_dist_secondary

|

NAME_2
+
year,

data =
panel_long

)

summary(
rf_roads,
cluster=
~NAME_2
)
```


```{r}
fs <- feols(

log_investment ~

oil_x_log_dist_baku

|

NAME_2
+
year,

data=
district_panel

)

summary(
fs,
cluster=
~NAME_2
)
```

```{r}
rf_no_baku <- feols(

log_ntl_eps ~

oil_price_brent

|

pixel_id,

data=
panel_long

)

summary(
rf_no_baku,
cluster=~NAME_2
)
```
```{r}
rf_compare <- feols(

log_ntl_eps ~

oil_price_brent
+
oil_price_brent:log_dist_baku

|

pixel_id,

data=
panel_long

)

summary(
rf_compare,
cluster=~NAME_2
)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# REGRESSION TABLE — THESIS VERSION
# =========================================================



models <- list(
 "RF: Pixel FE" = rf_main,
 "RF: District FE + Roads" = rf_roads,
"First Stage" = fs,
 "Oil only" = rf_no_baku,
 "Oil + Interaction" = rf_compare
)

modelsummary(
 models,
 vcov = ~ NAME_2,
 stars = TRUE,
 coef_map = c(
 "oil_price_brent:log_dist_baku" = "Oil price × log distance to Baku",
 "oil_x_log_dist_baku" = "Oil price × log distance to Baku",
 "oil_price_brent" = "Oil price",
"log_dist_major" = "Log distance to major road",
 "log_dist_secondary" = "Log distance to secondary road"
 ),
gof_omit = "IC|Log|RMSE",
output = here("Output", "regression_table.tex"),
escape = FALSE
)



etable(
rf_main,
 rf_roads,
 fs,
 rf_no_baku,
rf_compare,
cluster = ~ NAME_2
) 
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 50 — DISTRICT NTL GROWTH ANALYSIS (2010–2020)
# =========================================================



# -----------------------------------------
# Average NTL by district and year
# -----------------------------------------

district_growth <- panel_long %>%
  group_by(
    NAME_2,
    year
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_ntl =
      mean(
        ntl,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -----------------------------------------
# Compute growth indicators
# -----------------------------------------

growth_table <- district_growth %>%

  filter(
    year %in% c(
      2010,
      2020
    )
  ) %>%

  pivot_wider(
    names_from = year,
    values_from = mean_ntl
  ) %>%

  mutate(

    growth_pct =

      100 *
      (
        `2020`
        -
        `2010`
      ) /
      (
        `2010`
        +
        0.001
      ),

    cagr =

      (
        (
          (`2020` + 0.001) /
          (`2010` + 0.001)
        )^(1 / 10)
        -
        1
      ) *
      100

  ) %>%

  arrange(
    desc(cagr)
  )

# -----------------------------------------
# Show results
# -----------------------------------------

print(growth_table)

# Top 10 fastest growing districts

top10_growth <- growth_table %>%
  slice_max(
    cagr,
    n = 10
  )

print(top10_growth)

# Bottom 10

bottom10_growth <- growth_table %>%
  slice_min(
    cagr,
    n = 10
  )

print(bottom10_growth)

# -----------------------------------------
# Plot
# -----------------------------------------

ggplot(

top10_growth,

aes(
  x = reorder(
    NAME_2,
    cagr
  ),
  y = cagr
)

)+

geom_col(

fill =
"#1f77b4"

)+

coord_flip()+

theme_minimal()+

labs(

title =
"Top 10 Districts by Average Annual Nighttime Light Growth",

x =
NULL,

y =
"CAGR (%)"

)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK — DISTRICT GROWTH × INVESTMENT
# =========================================================

# Average investment by district

investment_avg <- district_panel %>%
  group_by(NAME_2) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_investment =
      mean(
        investment,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Merge

growth_reg <- growth_table %>%
  left_join(
    investment_avg,
    by = "NAME_2"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log_inv =
      log1p(
        avg_investment
      )
  )

# Regression

growth_model <- lm(

cagr ~

log_inv,

data =
growth_reg

)

summary(
growth_model
)

# =========================================================
# CHUNK — DISTRICT GROWTH × INVESTMENT
# =========================================================

# Average investment by district

investment_avg <- district_panel %>%
  group_by(NAME_2) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_investment =
      mean(
        investment,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Merge

growth_reg <- growth_table %>%
  left_join(
    investment_avg,
    by = "NAME_2"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log_inv =
      log1p(
        avg_investment
      )
  )

# Regression

growth_model <- lm(

cagr ~

log_inv,

data =
growth_reg

)

summary(
growth_model
)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 51 — INVESTMENT VS NTL GROWTH
# =========================================================


# Average total fixed capital investment by district
investment_avg <- district_panel %>%
  group_by(NAME_2) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_total_fixed_capital_investment = mean(
      investment,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Merge growth and investment data
growth_reg <- growth_table %>%
  left_join(
    investment_avg,
    by = "NAME_2"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log_total_fixed_capital_investment =
      log1p(avg_total_fixed_capital_investment),

    ntl_growth =
      log1p(`2020`) -
      log1p(`2010`),

    is_baku =
      ifelse(NAME_2 == "Bakı", "Baku", "Other districts")
  )

# Regression
m2 <- lm(
  ntl_growth ~ log_total_fixed_capital_investment,
  data = growth_reg
)

summary(m2)

# Extract regression statistics
r2 <- round(summary(m2)$r.squared, 3)

pval <- round(
  summary(m2)$coefficients[2, 4],
  3
)

stat_label <- paste0(
  "R² = ", r2,
  "\n",
  "p = ", pval
)

# Plot
ggplot(
  growth_reg,
  aes(
    x = log_total_fixed_capital_investment,
    y = ntl_growth
  )
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(shape = is_baku),
    alpha = 0.8,
    size = 2.5
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = growth_reg %>% filter(NAME_2 == "Bakı"),
    aes(label = "Baku"),
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold",
    nudge_y = 0.05
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x = max(growth_reg$log_total_fixed_capital_investment, na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(growth_reg$ntl_growth, na.rm = TRUE),
    label = stat_label,
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 5
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Fixed Capital Investment and Nighttime Light Growth",
    subtitle = "District-level relationship, 2010–2020",
    x = "Log average total fixed capital investment",
    y = "Log nighttime light growth (2020–2010)"
  )

# Create Figures folder if missing
dir.create(
  here("Figures"),
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

# Save PNG
ggsave(

here(
"Figures",
"investment_ntl_growth.png"
),

width = 10,
height = 7,
dpi = 400,
bg = "white"

)

# Save PDF (thesis version)

ggsave(

here(
"Figures",
"investment_ntl_growth.pdf"
),

width = 10,
height = 7

)

cat(
"\nFigure saved in:",
here("Figures")
)
```

```{r}


# =========================================================
# SAMPLE COVERAGE MAP — EXCLUDED REGIONS
# =========================================================


# Define excluded regions
excluded_regions <- c(
  # Nakhchivan
  "Babək",
  "Culfa",
  "Naxçıvan",
  "Ordubad",
  "Şahbuz",
  "Sədərək",
  "Şərur",

  # Karabakh-related districts
  "Ağdam",
  "Cəbrayıl",
  "Füzuli",
  "Zəngilan",
  "Qubadlı",
  "Laçın",
  "Kəlbəcər",
  "Ağdərə",
  "Xankəndi",
  "Şuşa",
  "Xocalı",
  "Xocavənd"
)

# Separate included and excluded polygons
aze_included <- aze_clean %>%
  filter(!NAME_2 %in% excluded_regions)

aze_excluded <- aze_clean %>%
  filter(NAME_2 %in% excluded_regions)

# Plot
sample_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = aze_clean,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey75",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = aze_included,
    fill = "white",
    color = "grey65",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = aze_excluded,
    fill = "grey90",
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Study Area and Excluded Regions",
    subtitle = "Nakhchivan and Karabakh-related districts are excluded from the main sample"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 16
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11
    )
  )

sample_map
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# SAVE SAMPLE COVERAGE MAP
# =========================================================

dir.create(
  here("Figures"),
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

ggsave(
  filename = here(
    "Figures",
    "sample_coverage_excluded_regions.png"
  ),
  plot = sample_map,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = here(
    "Figures",
    "sample_coverage_excluded_regions.pdf"
  ),
  plot = sample_map,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  bg = "white"
)
```
